_meta.description: Self-describing FileMaker schema source. Designed to be rendered by a passive viewer skin: every field carries the metadata needed to color, sort, and frame it without the viewer knowing anything app-specific.

conventions.global: g_ prefix; gLIST_ reserved for value-list globals

_meta.conventionNote: HML_LLC house style LOCKED by Michael 2026-07-15 (DD-008). URITP style (pk_/fk_) rejected for this app. Do not change without a superseding decision.

statusLegend.locked: canonical, do not rename without a schema decision
statusLegend.under-review: exists but a decision is open
